title: Volt: Volume Transformer: Revisiting Vanilla Transformers for 3D Scene Understanding
summary: Volt is a vanilla Transformer adapted for 3D scene understanding that partitions 3D scenes into volumetric patches and processes them with global self-attention and 3D rotary positional embeddings. To address data scarcity in 3D, the authors propose a training recipe based on strong 3D augmentations, regularization, and distillation. Scaling experiments show that Volt benefits more from increased supervision than specialized 3D backbones.
